# lark-mcp

> MCP server connecting Claude Desktop App to Lark (Feishu) workspaces.

## What it does

Wraps [lark-cli](https://github.com/larksuite/cli) as a read-only MCP server with five tools:

- `lark_wiki_spaces` — list wiki spaces
- `lark_wiki_nodes` — list pages inside a space
- `lark_wiki_read` — read a wiki page by URL (returns markdown)
- `lark_doc_read` — read a document by obj_token
- `lark_im_search` — search Lark messages by keyword

## How authentication works

Zero credentials in MCP config. lark-cli manages OAuth tokens in its own storage directory. The `claude_desktop_config.json` entry contains only `command` and `args`.

## Requirements

- Node.js v18+
- lark-cli installed and authenticated (`lark-cli auth login --domain wiki,docs,drive,im`)
- Claude Desktop App or any MCP-compatible client

## Source

https://github.com/yyu0310/lark-mcp
